name: Aa en Hunze (Netherlands)

colors.symbolism: the field, from the municipal arms

description: A green field bearing a yellow diagonal cross (saltire), with a yellow lily-crown in the triangle at the hoist.
history: Flag of the municipality of Aa en Hunze in the province of Drenthe. The municipality was formed on 1 January 1998 by the merger of Rolde, Gasselte, Gieten and Anloo, and the flag was adopted on 9 July 1998. Its design is derived from the municipal coat of arms.

features.role: yellow saltire from the municipal arms
a yellow lily-crown in the hoist triangle
